data.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** Sub-Agent Blocker

#### Expected Behavior

`plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md` must document:
1. `max_cycles` edge cases: ≤0 defaults to 3 with warning; non-numeric defaults to 3 with warning; values >10 capped at 10 with warning
2. A fenced block combining `/dso:fix-bug` with Triage Classification Context that also includes file ownership context
3. `INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED` classification comment guidance for deferred bugs
4. Phase 6 Step 1a non-interactive mode gate: defers file-overlap escalation
5. Phase 6 Step 1b non-interactive mode gate: defers oscillation-guard escalation

#### Actual Behavior

Tests fail at runtime:
- `test-debug-config-keys.sh`: test_max_cycles_negative_defaults, test_max_cycles_non_numeric_defaults, test_max_cycles_capped_at_10 (3 failures)
- `test-debug-everything-fix-bug-delegation.sh`: test_complete_task_invocation_example, test_assembled_prompt_includes_file_ownership (2 failures)
- `test-debug-everything-interactivity.sh`: test_deferred_items_get_classification_comment, test_interactivity_gates_file_overlap_escalation, test_interactivity_gates_oscillation_escalation (3 failures)

All 8 failures trace to missing content in `plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md`.
These are pre-existing CI failures (confirmed in run 24937956936 before any changes this session).
data.title: [debug-everything/SKILL.md]: Missing edge-case docs and guidance -> 8 CI test failures
